channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: South Korea physician strike linked to higher mortality rates
item.description: A recent strike by trainee doctors in South Korea was associated with significantly increased mortality and reduced inpatient and outpatient care.

item.title: Safe pregnancies with RMDs increase, but gaps remain
item.description: EULAR 2026 data show tight disease control enables safe pregnancies but highlights the need to address male fertility issues.

item.title: Married to Medicine: The other side of the story
item.description: Spouses of doctors share the challenges of being married to a physician and where to find support. Medscape Medical News.

item.title: New platform combines precision gene targeting with brain-wide delivery
item.description: A study describes a gene therapy strategy that uses the brain's glymphatic system to distribute engineered viral vectors throughout the brain.
